zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith de Nantes於0995年10月出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯時，她的父親Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes25歲，母親Melisende du Maine27歲。她於1018年與Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1063年2月27日在法國布-度-o享年67歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉蓋艾諾萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nantes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Valencia): nickname from a derivative of santer ‘excessively devoted to the saints’. This surname is most common in Mexico.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith de Nantes was born in October 0995, in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes, was 25 and her mother, Melisende du Maine, was 27. She married Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille in 1018. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 27 February 1063, in Bouches-du-Rhône, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith de Nantes est née en octobre 0995, à Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Melisende du Maine, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille en 1018. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 février 1063, à Bouches-du-Rhône, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Bretagne, France.

de.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Judith de Nantes im Oktober 0995 in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes 25 und ihre Mutter Melisende du Maine 27. Sie hat 1018 Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Februar 1063 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Nantes è nata il nel ottobre 0995 nel Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Melisende du Maine, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille nel 1018. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 27 febbraio 1063, nel Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith de Nantesが0995年10月にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクナンツで生まれた時，父Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannesは25歳，母Melisende du Maineは27歳であった。1018年にAlain III Craignart de Cornouailleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1063年2月27日にフランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンで67歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンフィニストeアサイント-グeノルeにて埋葬された。

ko.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠
ko.lifeSummary: Judith de Nantes(이)가 0995년 10월 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende du Maine(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1018년 Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1063년 2월 27일 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 세인트-구e노e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Nantes nasceu em outubro de 0995, em Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Melisende du Maine, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille em 1018. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1063, em Bouches-du-Rhône, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Bretagne, França.

ru.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith de Nantes родилась октябрь 0995 г. в местности нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende du Maine, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille в 1018 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 февраля 1063 г. в местности боучес-ду-рoн, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-гуeнолe, финистeр, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith de Nantes nació en octubre de 0995, en Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Melisende du Maine, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille en 1018. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1063, en Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Guénolé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.
